import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen: List<String> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let t = tokens.get(i)
  match t
  when Some(tok)
    mut found = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < seen.len()
      match seen.get(j)
      when Some(s)
        if s == tok
          found = true
        end
      when None
        found = found
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not found
      seen = list.push(seen, 0)
      seen = __list_str_set(seen, seen.len() - 1, tok)
    end
  when None
    i = i
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{seen.len()}")
